safety.tip: Safety reminder: Share your location with a trusted friend. You can leave at any time, no questions asked. If there is a problem, contact the host via this DM.

dm.checkin_banner: You've been accepted! Tap when you arrive.
dm.title: DM
dm.safety_tip_body: Never share personal info before meeting. Meet in a safe place. Tell a friend.

landing.hero_desc: One link to build your crew. Private profiles, trust-based voting, secure check-in. No WhatsApp chaos, no pictures floating around.
landing.headline: Organize your group tonight
landing.subheadline: Recruit, vote, coordinate. No WhatsApp, no phone numbers shared.
landing.philosophy_quote: Because modern relationships are fluid. And they deserve an app that embraces them.
landing.philosophy_body: Individual freedom. Sexual liberation. Human connections that evolve. Fluidz embraces all of it — and turns encounters into real connections.
landing.problem_desc: Grindr is where it starts. But then what? WhatsApp groups, private pictures circulating, awkwardness, no structure. Fluidz takes over.
landing.problem_awkward_desc: Who's coming? Where is it? Who is this?
landing.killer_1_desc: Title, vibe, tags, hidden address. Share the link, candidates apply with their profile. You choose who comes.
landing.killer_2_desc: After each session, participants rate each other. Your VibeScore reflects your reliability and respect. The higher it is, the faster you get accepted.
landing.features_subtitle: Everything to organize, recruit, and manage your group sessions — and your relationships over time.
landing.feat_group_sessions_desc: Share one link. Candidates see the session, apply, share their profile. Zero friction.
landing.feat_privacy_first_desc: Applications, advisory votes, the host decides. No chaotic WhatsApp group.
landing.feat_trust_based_desc: Public, adult, health — you choose what to show, to whom, when. Nothing shared by default.
landing.feat_realtime_chat_desc: Public, adult, health sections. You control every field, every photo.
landing.feat_selective_sharing_desc: Manage contacts over time. Favorites, notes, history. Relationships evolve, your Book does too.
landing.feat_instant_matching_desc: Launch now or schedule ahead. Duration, spots, roles wanted. Everything managed.
landing.how_title: Someone sends you a code. Let's go.
landing.how_subtitle: No account needed. You get a link, you apply. The host decides.
landing.step_1_desc: Someone shares a Fluidz link — on Grindr, WhatsApp, Telegram, IRL.
landing.step_2_desc: Select profile sections: public, adult, health. Photo by photo.
landing.step_3_desc: Members vote. Host accepts. The exact address is revealed.
landing.step_4_desc: Confirm arrival. Host validates. Step-by-step directions.
landing.diff_address_desc: Exact address only revealed after acceptance.
landing.diff_profile_desc: Choose what you show, section by section.
landing.diff_no_whatsapp_desc: Everything happens in-app. Chat, DM, coordination.
landing.preview_desc: Dark interface, designed mobile-first. Every detail matters.
landing.pro_desc: Fluidz Pro offers professional tools: QR check-in, digital cloakroom, staff management, wave booking.
landing.early_desc: Fluidz is invite-only. Sign up or get a code from a friend already using it.
landing.vision_quote: Sexual encounters can become dates. Dates become relationships. Relationships become whatever you make them.
landing.vision_body: Fluidz manages intent matching: who you meet, how relationships evolve, and multiplying quality connections.
landing.footer: Made for the queer community. Paris, 2026.

push.enable_desc: Get pinged when someone applies or messages you
